jsonLd.title: Bewakoof is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Bewakoof! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Dhanbad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Bewakoof:
Bewakoof is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bewakoof!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
